nasb.text: the Arabah also, with the Jordan as a border, from Chinnereth even as far as the sea of the Arabah, the Salt Sea, at the foot of the slopes of Pisgah on the east.

esv.text: the Arabah also, with the Jordan as the border, from Chinnereth as far as the Sea of the Arabah, the Salt Sea, under the slopes of Pisgah on the east.

cnv.text: 又把亞拉巴，和以約旦河為界，從基尼烈直到亞拉巴海，就是鹽海，在毘斯迦山坡下東邊的地方，都給了他們。

ccb.text: 我还把亚拉巴，就是以约旦河为界，从基尼烈直到东面毗斯迦山脚的亚拉巴海，即盐海地区给了他们。
